Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Quick assessment\n\n- Current compassionate-use dosing parameters appear internally consistent.\n- No obvious PK parameter instability is evident from this config snapshot alone.\n- CU-001 and CU-002 look clinically stable/responding based on the latest notes.\n- CU-003 is newly enrolled, so continued close PK follow-up is advisable as additional post-dose data comes in.\n\n> Note: calculated dose values are nominal weight-based doses and may still require protocol-specific rounding or formulation adjustment before administration.", recipients="") ]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing config from `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml` and saved a quick summary report for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:

- **CU-001** — 34 months, 12.4 kg  
  - **Dose:** 0.15 mg/kg → **1.86 mg nominal**
  - **Frequency:** q3w
  - **Next dose:** 2026-04-14
  - **PK clearance:** 3.2 mL/min
  - **Status:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan

- **CU-002** — 18 months, 9.1 kg  
  - **Dose:** 0.12 mg/kg → **1.09 mg nominal**
  - **Frequency:** q3w
  - **Next dose:** 2026-04-12
  - **PK clearance:** 2.8 mL/min
  - **Status:** Responding well; weight gain improving

- **CU-003** — 51 months, 15.7 kg  
  - **Dose:** 0.18 mg/kg → **2.83 mg nominal**
  - **Frequency:** q2w
  - **Next dose:** 2026-04-10
  - **PK clearance:** 4.1 mL/min
  - **Status:** New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On your PK question: **nothing in the current dosing config suggests instability**. The parameters look internally consistent, and the patient notes are reassuring overall. The main watch item is **CU-003**, since they’re newly enrolled and will need continued close follow-up as more post-dose PK data comes in.

If you want, I can also format this into a shorter email-ready version for Dr. Martinez.
